parameters.query: =INSERT INTO consultas_esaj (whatsapp_from, whatsapp_phone_number, cpf, nome_requerente, processos, total_processos, resposta_formatada, current_state, state_updated_at, timestamp_consulta, created_at, updated_at, mp_payment_status, mp_payment_id, mp_payment_amount, payment_confirmed_at) VALUES ('5511941455345', '5511941455345', '{{ $json.cpf }}', '{{ ($json.nome_extraido || "N/A").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ JSON.stringify({lista: $json.processos_array || []}) }}'::jsonb, {{ $json.total_processos || 0 }}, '{{ ($json.responseText || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'PAYMENT_APPROVED', NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 'approved', 'BATCH_' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::text, 1.00, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (whatsapp_from, cpf) DO UPDATE SET nome_requerente = EXCLUDED.nome_requerente, processos = EXCLUDED.processos, total_processos = EXCLUDED.total_processos, resposta_formatada = EXCLUDED.resposta_formatada, current_state = EXCLUDED.current_state, state_updated_at = NOW(), timestamp_consulta = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), mp_payment_status = EXCLUDED.mp_payment_status, mp_payment_id = EXCLUDED.mp_payment_id, mp_payment_amount = EXCLUDED.mp_payment_amount, payment_confirmed_at = EXCLUDED.payment_confirmed_at RETURNING id, cpf, nome_requerente, total_processos
